name: Roberta's (LA)
teaser: Consistent option for the valley or Culver City, which aren't necessarily rolling in good pizza.
review: Serving well-made, non-fussy Neapolitan pies in lo-fi Bushwick felt revolutionary in 2009...less so at fancy outdoor malls in Los Angeles in 2024. Still, it's a consistent option for the valley or Culver City, which aren't necessarily rolling in good pizza.
headsUp: More polished than the Brooklyn original. Less character, more consistency.
update: Reliable if you are in Culver City or the Valley and need a good pie.
